trending_topics: AI coding assistants (GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Claude Code, Devin) replacing junior developer tasks

Senior engineers becoming 'AI orchestrators' rather than hands-on coders

New job title emergence: AI Prompt Engineer, AI Agent Manager, Human-in-the-loop QA
Comparison of AI coding tools' benchmark performance (SWE-bench scores)
search_trends: "will AI replace software engineers" - high search volume, recurring spikes with major AI model releases
"is coding still worth learning" - rising searches among students/career changers
"software engineer job market 2025" - elevated search volume tied to layoff news
"Devin AI review" and "autonomous coding agent" - trending after product demos
"junior developer jobs disappearing" - growing search interest
"learn to code still relevant" - youth/career-changer search pattern increasing
"AI pair programming vs human" - steady interest
viral_opportunities: Hot take content: 'AI didn't replace engineers, it replaced bad interviews' - contrarian angle performs well
Before/after case studies: solo founder building an app with AI tools in 48 hours
Data-driven threads debunking or confirming layoff-to-AI causation claims
Interviews/reactions from senior engineers on what skills remain irreplaceable (system design, debugging judgment, architecture)
Short-form video: 'I let AI write my code for a week - here's what broke'
Controversial YouTube/X threads: 'Junior developers are the real casualty of AI, and here's the data'
Polls/engagement bait: 'Will you still recommend CS degrees in 2026?'
Behind-the-scenes content from AI coding tool teams responding to replacement fears
Real salary/hiring data visualizations showing actual engineer demand trends vs. hype narrative
recommended_content: Myth-busting explainer: what AI coding tools can and cannot do today (with concrete examples)
Career guide: skills software engineers should build to stay relevant in an AI-augmented workflow
Trend analysis piece backed by hiring data (LinkedIn, Indeed, BLS) comparing narrative vs. reality
Case study series featuring teams that increased velocity using AI without cutting headcount
Opinion piece from a senior engineer perspective: 'The job is changing, not disappearing'
Comparison guide of top AI coding agents/tools with pros/cons for different skill levels
Interactive content: quiz on 'Is your dev task automatable by AI?'
